title: Bullish Absorption
author: Frosty-Pirate444
selftext:
Before the market reverses, there will be some sort of absorption. Passive buyers absorb aggressive sellers and price goes up for a nice swing. This is not random and happens every day in the market.

https://preview.redd.it/0iu6p9gar2vg1.png?width=1855&format=png&auto=webp&s=cd6135eb881a46d7846e0892b827fc4b4fc35977

Increased selling with no follow through and in this case even better is having rejection at the low. I placed my stop loss for this trade just below the absorption. The absorption area is a great area for entry and/or stop loss placement.
